name: trinuc_GAA_1000bp
description: (GAA)n trinucleotide expansion, 1000 bp total (333 copies). FRDA-like: Friedreich-ataxia FXN intron 1 repeat. Triplex (H-DNA) prone. Stresses mapper handling of pathogenic short tandem repeats.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
